title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Reporting to the CRO, this is a hands-on leadership role requiring 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, revenue analytics, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Collaboration with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones is expected.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps/GTM, Salesforce expertise, and experience scaling high-growth companies directly align with Finout's need for a Head of Revenue Operations. The Tel Aviv/NY hybrid structure matches his location preferences perfectly, and the Fintech/cloud infrastructure sector fits his strong vertical.
ai_opener: I've been tracking Finout's growth trajectory—your cloud cost management platform solving real pain points for enterprise teams like Lyft and NYT is exactly the kind of scaling challenge I've tackled for 15+ years. With deep Salesforce expertise and proven success building RevOps functions that enabled 8-figure ARR growth across multiple high-velocity B2B SaaS companies, I'm genuinely excited about architecting your GTM operational backbone and reporting into a CRO who values strategic execution.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue intelligence leader, seeks a RevOps Manager focused on territory strategy and operations to accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM planning, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models and segmentation, strong analytical skills with Excel/SQL/BI tools (Tableau, Retool), and CRM proficiency, especially Salesforce. Responsibilities include territory mapping, capacity modeling, market expansion projects, and partnering with Sales, Strategy, and Finance.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps and GTM expertise directly align with this role's territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, and Salesforce proficiency requirements. The hybrid structure and Gong's revenue intelligence focus are ideal matches for his seniority and analytical skillset.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building scalable RevOps and GTM engines in B2B SaaS, and your Territory Strategy & Operations role at Gong caught my attention because it's exactly where data-driven territory design and seller productivity intersect. I've led similar capacity modeling and market expansion projects, and I'm impressed by how Gong uses revenue intelligence to solve the same optimization problems I've tackled with Salesforce and BI tools.

title: Senior Revenue Operations Manager
location: Remote (US or Canada, Eastern time preferred)

This foundational, player-coach role reports to the C-suite and involves architecting systems, processes, and insights that drive predictable revenue across Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success. Requires GTM/RevOps experience in a Mid-Market or Lower Enterprise sales motion ($25k-$75k ACV), companies from $5M-$30M ARR, and deep experience with GTM tech stacks (HubSpot, Salesforce, Gong). With deep experience architecting predictable revenue systems across Sales, Marketing, and CS for mid-market motions using HubSpot and Salesforce, I'd be interested in exploring how we can accelerate your GTM engine from day one.

title: GTM Engineer

As GTM Engineer, you'll build, configure, and continuously improve these AI agents, working at the intersection of data, automation, and human workflows. title: GTM Engineer

title: GTM Engineer
